texts: Hold and turn the clothesstand around to a different orientation.
Kick the clothesstand, and set it back down.
Lift the clothesstand, move the clothesstand, and put down the clothesstand.
Pick up the fallen clothesstand.
Pull the clothesstand, and set it back down.
Put the clothesstand horizontally down, then pick up the fallen clothesstand.
Put the clothesstand horizontally down.
Kick the base of the floorlamp, and set it back down.
Lift the floorlamp, adjust the orientation of the floorlamp, and set it back down.
Lift the floorlamp, move the floorlamp, and put down the floorlamp.
Pull the floorlamp, and set it back down.
Kick the largebox, and set it back down.

Push the largebox, and set it back down.
Push the largebox, release the hands, then pull the largebox, and set it back down.
Kick the largetable, and set it back down.
Lift the largetable above your head, spin it and put the largetable down.
Lift the largetable above your head, walk, and put the largetable down.
Lift the largetable by one of the edges, rotate it, drag the largetable and place the legs back down.
Lift the largetable, move the largetable and put down the largetable.
Lift the largetable, so only two legs are off the floor. Slide your feet and rotate the largetable as you slide. Lower the largetable with your hands.
Pull the largetable, and set it back down.
Push the largetable, and set it back down.
Push the largetable, release the hands, then drag the largetable, and set it back down.
Grasp the sides of the monitor, tilt it, pull the monitor, and set it back down.
Lift the monitor, move the monitor, and put down the monitor.
Lift the monitor, move the monitor, and put down the monitor. Then lift the monitor, move the monitor, and put down the monitor.
Lift the monitor, put down the monitor while rotating it.
Lift the monitor, put down the monitor, and then rotate the monitor to adjust its orientation..
Lift the monitor, rotate the monitor, and put down the monitor.

Facing the back of the whitechair, lift the whitechair, move the whitechair, and then place the whitechair on the floor.
Grab the top of the whitechair, swing the whitechair, and put down the whitechair.
Grab the whitechair's legs, tilt the whitechair.
Hold the whitechair and turn it around to face a diffferent orientation.
Kick the whitechair, and set it back down.
Lift the whitechair over your head, walk and then place the whitechair on the floor.
Lift the whitechair, flip it upside down and place it on top of the table.
Lift the whitechair, move the whitechair, and put down the whitechair.
Lift the whitechair, rotate the whitechair, and set it back down.
Move the whitechair upside down from the table to the floor.
Push the whitechair, release the hands, then drag the whitechair, and set it back down.
Put your hand on the back of the whitechair, pull the whitechair, and set it back down.
Use the foot to scoot the whitechair to change its orientation.

Push the woodchair, release the hands, then drag the woodchair, and set it back down.
Put your hand on the back of the woodchair, pull the woodchair, and set it back down.
Use the foot to scoot the woodchair to change its orientation.
